description:
Document in the hand of Yefet b. David. Maybe listing expenses and income. Among many other items mentions al-bayt al-ṣaghīr, Dār al-Azraq, the house of the Baʾalbakī, al-Ḥaver, a ruqʿa from Nissim for 8 dinars; a carpenter. 

Torn and reused on recto for a legal formulary for the reversal of a ban of excommunication (taḥlīl al-ḥerem).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
